name: userend
description: 蛋糕定制微信小程序用户端 uni-app 工程

scripts.dev:mp-weixin: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe launch mp-weixin --project userend && popd
scripts.build:mp-weixin: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe launch mp-weixin --project userend --compile true && popd
scripts.dev:web: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe launch web --project userend --browser Built && popd
scripts.build:web: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe launch web --project userend --compile true --browser Built && popd
scripts.log:mp-weixin: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe logcat mp-weixin --project userend --mode prevBuild && popd
scripts.log:web: pushd E:\work\birth && D:\HBuilderX\cli.exe logcat web --project userend --mode prevBuild --browser Built && popd
